title: mizrach #4217
definition:
1) place of sunrise, east
    1a) sunrise, east (with 'sun')
    1b) the east (without 'sun')
        1b1) to or toward the place of sunrise
        1b2) to the east, eastward
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) place of sunrise, east
    1a) sunrise, east (with 'sun')
    1b) the east (without 'sun')
        1b1) to or toward the place of sunrise
        1b2) to the east, eastward

    NASB:  place of sunrise, the east
